content:
# UV-Vis Spectroscopy

**Summary**: A method to measure the absorption of light by a sample as a function of wavelength.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009]] used UV/VIS spectrophotometry for the determination of ozone in water via the indigo method.

## Key Results and Findings

- Ozone concentration was determined using the decolorization of indigo trisulfonate at 600nm. ([[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009, p. 51]])
